guardrails.note: Read-only public search refresh session pack. It turns public refresh waves into manual SEO refresh sessions without editing public pages.
guardrails.stopBefore: Use this pack to plan exact public-page refresh edits. Metadata, body, canonical, source, or link changes require human approval before editing.
